title: Indestructible Tools
description: Craft powerful tools that can never be destroyed!
body:
# Indestructible Tools
[![Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/florian-berger/indestructible-tools?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/florian-berger/indestructible-tools)  [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/302523634075828226?label=Discord&logo=discord&style=for-the-badge)](https://ultgmng.de/discord)

We all know it - way too much resources are wasted by creating one pickaxe after the other, when we are creating epic buildings.    

This modification adds **Indestructible Tools** to the game! You do not have to search for a villager that is trading a 'Mending' book, you do not have to trade or find a mass of emeralds for repairable tools. When using this mod, all you have to do is create some _**Indestructible Ingot**_ by crafting a **Diamond**, a **Netherite Ingot**, and a **Iron Ingot** together.    
![Recpie: Ingot](https://github.com/florian-berger/indestructible-tools/blob/master/curseforge/images/Recipe_Ingot.png?raw=true) 
    
These ingots can be used to create the following tools:    
![Recpie: Tools](https://github.com/florian-berger/indestructible-tools/blob/master/curseforge/images/tools-recipes.gif?raw=true) 

## Multi-Tool
From **Version 2022.1.0** (Minecraft 1.18.1), you can create a Multi-Tool that combines the functionality of the pickaxe, the shovel, and the axe. Craft it by using the following recipe:    
![Recpie: Multi-Tool](https://github.com/florian-berger/indestructible-tools/blob/master/curseforge/images/Recipe_Multitool.png?raw=true) 

## Modpack
Feel free to use the mod in your modpack. If it is not hosted on CurseForge or modrinth, please link back to this page or the source repository on GitHub.
